microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing deployment workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise clients including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled scalable, repeatable client-side deployment with minimal engineering overhead.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model across enterprise healthcare and cloud clients.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring strict compliance and full-stack integration coordination.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, restructuring end-to-end execution cycles to reduce planning time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — directly expanding the team's ability to onboard and support new client deployments.
microsoft_2023: Championed **client adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting live demos and hands-on training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly on documentation and deployment tasks.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating client needs into actionable technical requirements for the engineering team.

Improved **data retrieval and onboarding speed** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and streamlining client-facing technical documentation across deployments.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched cloud regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams — directly reducing client integration timelines at scale.

Drove a product strategy to eliminate deployment toil during region launches, conducting discovery with **20+ service teams** to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate critical-path integration steps.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil and flag automation gaps across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact deployment improvements and accelerate client onboarding support.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating cross-functional deployment execution across IT and Operations.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority integration tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process during a complex, multi-site rollout.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing repeatable release workflows for ongoing client-side system updates.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by optimizing end-to-end operations and managing the full scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM process — improving client onboarding speed and proposal accuracy.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to align with client-facing healthcare-style compliance and trust signals.

Strengthened leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and closing margin leaks and delivering data-driven recommendations that informed forward deployment resourcing decisions.
